## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Metadata and GrowthX to discuss content performance, review processes, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Slight uptick in clicks/impressions, but below target (40-50 clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Refreshed articles showing positive momentum in average position change](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Content review process: Focus on internal linking, data accuracy, and removing fluff](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [20 new pieces to be reviewed by Anthony by end of week; images ready Monday](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Slight uptick in clicks and impressions from previous week](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Target: 40-50 clicks per week (currently underperforming)](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Impressions growing, but clicks not following suit proportionally](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Best performing topics: Facebook ads, marketing strategies, and platform-specific content (e.g., LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Refreshed articles showing positive average position change](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Explore stronger CTAs in page titles to improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Next 20 articles to include stronger CTAs at end of titles](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Consider adjusting meta descriptions for better performance](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Investigate adding latest position data to performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Remove outdated stats (e.g., Facebook user data from 2023) when more recent data unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Anthony's focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
    1.  Internal linking (improving)
    2.  Data accuracy and relevance
    3.  Instruction accuracy for technical implementations
    4.  Removing redundant or "fluffy" content
  - [Aida to pre-screen for these issues to expedite Anthony's review](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [20 new pieces to be reviewed by Anthony by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [2 additional pieces added to the queue](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Images for new content to be ready on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle and Aida to meet Monday to discuss content strategy for improving clicks](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Generate overall performance report for all blog content since project start](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Implement stronger CTAs in titles for next 20 articles](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Anthony to complete review of 20 pieces by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Sadira to add images to reviewed content on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/w6D_izrsBh1M2-iDfx3ry4YX9fSQmvCY?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
